headline: Kiwi-Born Legal AI Company Ivo Partners with New Zealand Football as Global Expansion Accelerates
summary: Ivo, the leading platform for AI contract intelligence, today announced a partnership with New Zealand Football to become the Official Legal AI Partner of the All Whites, New Zealand's men's national team.

headline: Uber and LISC open new grant application through Health Access Fund to bridge transportation gaps for low-income patients
summary: Uber and the Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC) today expanded their joint Health Access Fund with the announcement of up to $750,000 in new grants—averaging $50,000 per awardee—to help nonprofit healthcare providers connect economically vulnerable people to transportation for vital health services.

headline: Uber Caps AI Spending As Investors Weigh Costs Versus Undervalued Stock
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has imposed an internal cap on employee use of advanced AI tools after the company exceeded its annual AI budget within roughly four months. The move follows leadership comments questioning the direct business impact of current AI investments and their contribution to productivity. The restriction highlights both strong internal demand for generative AI and concerns about cost control and operational returns. For investors watching NYSE:UBER, the AI spending...
